'''âv-dh-b''' ('''kavadhab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pooh|pooh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pooh|pooh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-dh-b
|-
! Lemma
| kavadhab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivadhab|thivadhab]] || [[word:jivadhab|jivadhab]] || [[word:shivadhab|shivadhab]] || [[word:kivadhab|kivadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvadhab|thuthuvadhab]] || [[word:jujuvadhab|jujuvadhab]] || [[word:shushuvadhab|shushuvadhab]] || [[word:kukuvadhab|kukuvadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvadhab|thuvadhab]] || [[word:juvadhab|juvadhab]] || [[word:shuvadhab|shuvadhab]] || [[word:kuvadhab|kuvadhab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvadhab|thuvadhab]] || [[word:juvadhab|juvadhab]] || [[word:shuvadhab|shuvadhab]] || [[word:kuvadhab|kuvadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevadhab|thevadhab]] || [[word:jevadhab|jevadhab]] || [[word:shevadhab|shevadhab]] || [[word:kevadhab|kevadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovadhab|thothovadhab]] || [[word:jojovadhab|jojovadhab]] || [[word:shoshovadhab|shoshovadhab]] || [[word:kokovadhab|kokovadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovadhab|thovadhab]] || [[word:jovadhab|jovadhab]] || [[word:shovadhab|shovadhab]] || [[word:kovadhab|kovadhab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovadhab|thovadhab]] || [[word:jovadhab|jovadhab]] || [[word:shovadhab|shovadhab]] || [[word:kovadhab|kovadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvadhab|thĂŠvadhab]] || [[word:jĂŠvadhab|jĂŠvadhab]] || [[word:shĂŠvadhab|shĂŠvadhab]] || [[word:kĂŠvadhab|kĂŠvadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavadhab|thathavadhab]] || [[word:jajavadhab|jajavadhab]] || [[word:shashavadhab|shashavadhab]] || [[word:kakavadhab|kakavadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavadhab|thavadhab]] || [[word:javadhab|javadhab]] || [[word:shavadhab|shavadhab]] || [[word:kavadhab|kavadhab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavadhab|thavadhab]] || [[word:javadhab|javadhab]] || [[word:shavadhab|shavadhab]] || [[word:kavadhab|kavadhab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavadhab|shavadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavadhab|goshavadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavadhab|gokishavadhab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavadhabnĂŒ|shavadhabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavadhabnknĂŒ|goshavadhabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadhabnĂŒ|gokishavadhabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavadhabshĂ«|shavadhabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkshĂ«|goshavadhabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavadhabshĂ«|gokishavadhabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadhabro|shavadhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkro|goshavadhabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadhabro|gokishavadhabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadhabmu|shavadhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkmu|goshavadhabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadhabmu|gokishavadhabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavadhabsher|shavadhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavadhabnksher|goshavadhabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavadhabsher|gokishavadhabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavadhabng|shavadhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkng|goshavadhabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavadhabng|gokishavadhabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavadhabya|shavadhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkya|goshavadhabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavadhabya|gokishavadhabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavadhabyam|shavadhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkyam|goshavadhabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavadhabyam|gokishavadhabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadhabnĂŒshĂ«|shavadhabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadhabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavadhabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadhabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavadhabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadhabnĂŒro|shavadhabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadhabnknĂŒro|goshavadhabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadhabnĂŒro|gokishavadhabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadhabnĂŒmu|shavadhabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadhabnknĂŒmu|goshavadhabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadhabnĂŒmu|gokishavadhabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadhabshĂ«nĂŒ|shavadhabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavadhabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadhabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavadhabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadhabshĂ«ro|shavadhabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkshĂ«ro|goshavadhabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadhabshĂ«ro|gokishavadhabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadhabshĂ«mu|shavadhabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkshĂ«mu|goshavadhabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadhabshĂ«mu|gokishavadhabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadhabronĂŒ|shavadhabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkronĂŒ|goshavadhabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadhabronĂŒ|gokishavadhabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadhabroshĂ«|shavadhabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkroshĂ«|goshavadhabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadhabroshĂ«|gokishavadhabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadhabromu|shavadhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkromu|goshavadhabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadhabromu|gokishavadhabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadhabmunĂŒ|shavadhabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkmunĂŒ|goshavadhabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadhabmunĂŒ|gokishavadhabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadhabmushĂ«|shavadhabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkmushĂ«|goshavadhabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadhabmushĂ«|gokishavadhabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadhabmuro|shavadhabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadhabnkmuro|goshavadhabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadhabmuro|gokishavadhabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
